response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed-systems experience (e.g., low-latency microservices at Dunnhumby, event-driven platforms at GISCollective) and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, including MCP and agentic workflows. However, his fintech experience is limited, and his leadership track record lacks clear evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ people or operating in regulated environments. His role at re:cinq is recent and short, raising questions about depth in agentic AI or fintech integration.
strengths: Proven expertise in event-driven architectures and distributed systems (Dunnhumby, GISCollective)
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent frameworks and MCP at re:cinq
Strong engineering leadership in open-source and team-building (GISCollective, Altom Consulting)
concerns: Limited fintech or credit-risk experience, which is critical for the role
No clear evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ or operating in regulated environments
Recent career gap and short tenure at re:cinq (6 months) may indicate instability or lack of depth in agentic AI
